parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Planning Scenario 'default operator information' - V1.0.0

participant MP
participant Lookup
participant TO

note over TO
  **ProcessIdentifiers:** DEFAULT
end note

note over MP
  Endpoints that could be used by the MP:
  /operator/meta
  /operator/available-assets
  /operator/stations
  /operator/regions
  /operator/operating-calendar
  /operator/operating-hours
  /operator/pricing-plans
  /operator/information
end note

MP -> TO: e.g. /operator/available-assets
activate TO
TO --> MP: available assettypes (optionally containing assets)
deactivate TO

note over MP, Lookup
  Endpoints that could be used by the MP:
  /operator/meta
  /operator/information
  /operator/regions
end note

Lookup -> TO: e.g. /operator/meta
activate TO
TO --> Lookup: precise description of the implementation of the API
deactivate TO

@enduml
```
